feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Periods of snow are expected from Friday afternoon till early Saturday morning. 3 to 6 cm could accumulate above 600 metres, with lesser amounts lowers down.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Road Snowfall Warning
entry.summary: Period of snow are expected from late Friday morning till the early hours of Saturday. 10 to 15 cm of snow is expected to accumulate above 800 metres during the period, while 5 to 10 cm is expected down to 400 metres from late Friday afternoon.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Thunderstorms possible Friday evening. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Thunderstorms possible. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: The chance of upgrade for this Watch has been decreased to Low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
